name: stack-add of a technology name (not a namespace) bridges to the resolver and activates its family
command: bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/commands/full-surface-intake.sh" --workload "a platform" --stack-add vue --classify 2>/dev/null | ruby -rjson -e 'c=JSON.parse(STDIN.read)["workload_classification"]; exit(c["family_activated"]==["vue"] && c["namespaces"].include?("web-vitals") && !c["namespaces"].include?("react") ? 0:1)' && echo stack-tech-activates-family 1>&2
